specific_location: 5 miles east of Kremmling, CR 39, woods very near the Colorado River
description: My observations of the bird were relatively brief.  I heard it singing vigorously ('Che bek' call, repeated every 2-3 seconds), and that is what drew my attention to it.  I walked up towards it, and saw enough to confirm that it was an empid.  I did not see enough visual evidence to distinguish it from other empids.
